label: Gen step settlement
description: Scatters a procedurally generated enemy settlement onto the map.

generatePawns.label: Generate pawns
generatePawns.description: Whether enemy pawns are generated inside the settlement.

postProcessSettlementParams.label: Post-process settlement params
postProcessSettlementParams.description: Optional parameters for post-generation processing of settlement buildings.

requiredGravcoreRooms.label: Required gravcore rooms
requiredGravcoreRooms.description: Minimum number of gravcore-compatible rooms the settlement must contain.

lootThingSetMaker.label: Loot thing set maker
lootThingSetMaker.description: ThingSetMakerDef used to generate loot placed in the settlement.

lootMarketValue.label: Loot market value
lootMarketValue.description: Target total market value of the loot generated in the settlement. Absent means no override.
